verses.text: Achan takes of the accursed thing; God's anger kindles. The sin. One man's sin touches all.
Israel is routed at Ai; their hearts melt like water. Defeat. Hidden sin brings defeat.
Israel is routed at Ai; their hearts melt like water. Defeat. Hidden sin brings defeat.
Israel is routed at Ai; their hearts melt like water. Defeat. Hidden sin brings defeat.
Israel is routed at Ai; their hearts melt like water. Defeat. Hidden sin brings defeat.
Joshua falls before the ark in grief. Grief. He pleads with God.
Joshua falls before the ark in grief. Grief. He pleads with God.
Joshua falls before the ark in grief. Grief. He pleads with God.
Joshua falls before the ark in grief. Grief. He pleads with God.
God says Israel has sinned and taken the accursed thing. Exposed. Sin must be dealt with.
God says Israel has sinned and taken the accursed thing. Exposed. Sin must be dealt with.
God says Israel has sinned and taken the accursed thing. Exposed. Sin must be dealt with.
Sanctify the people; the guilty shall be found by lot. The lot. God will single out the sinner.
Sanctify the people; the guilty shall be found by lot. The lot. God will single out the sinner.
Sanctify the people; the guilty shall be found by lot. The lot. God will single out the sinner.
The lot falls on Achan. Found. Sin cannot hide from God.
The lot falls on Achan. Found. Sin cannot hide from God.
The lot falls on Achan. Found. Sin cannot hide from God.
Achan confesses he took a garment, silver, and gold. Confession. The hidden is brought to light.
Achan confesses he took a garment, silver, and gold. Confession. The hidden is brought to light.
Achan confesses he took a garment, silver, and gold. Confession. The hidden is brought to light.
The spoil is found in his tent and brought out. Found. The sin is laid bare.
The spoil is found in his tent and brought out. Found. The sin is laid bare.
Achan and his are stoned and burned in the valley of Achor. Judgment. Sin is purged from the camp.
Achan and his are stoned and burned in the valley of Achor. Judgment. Sin is purged from the camp.
